subcodes.first_line: O thou who art discerning and perceiving, who hast attained unto the hidden mystery and the guarded symbol in the Tablets of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ايّها الخبير البصير الواقف علی السّرّ المکنون و الرّمز المصون فی صحائف اللّه المهيمن القيّوم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @angels, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
